programme.title: Incredible Tales S8
programme.desc: Do ghosts really exist? Or are they nothing more than a figment of our imagination? Stay tuned to explore the thin line between reality and the supernatural.

programme.title: The Ark S1
programme.desc: Follows the remaining crew of a spacecraft known as Ark One, who must become the best versions of themselves to stay on course and survive after experiencing a catastrophic event that caused massive destruction and loss of life.

programme.title: Lingo UK S1
programme.desc: Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: Beat the Chasers S6
programme.desc: Could you beat the greatest quiz team ever assembled? Bringing together all five of our favourite quiz geniuses, Beat the Chasers, hosted by Bradley Walsh, expands the award-winning The Chase brand for a primetime audience.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia S12
programme.desc: The exhilarating hit game show where contestants must beat The Banker to win a huge cash prize, is making a triumphant return. The ultimate contest of nerve, luck and pure gut instinct will be fronted by one of Australia's most beloved TV presenters, Gold Logie winner Grant Denyer.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo: The New Generation
programme.desc: Kim plays a game of 'Why is this Dangerous?' with Yoyo, Yaya and the audience. She pulls things out of her mystery box and they have to tell her what the things are and why they are dangerous. Why segment - Why is it dangerous to run when your clothes catch fire? Kim explains what to do when your clothes are on fire. She teaches Yaya and Yoyo to 'stop, drop and roll' in order to put out the fire, and not run.

programme.title: Club M.A.G.I.C Sr 3
programme.desc: CLUB M.A.G.I.C - the first, locally produced preschool series on OKTO returns for a third season with fresh new ideas for a positively fun learning experience! An original concept developed for preschoolers.

programme.title: The Big Q S2
programme.desc: The Big Q S2.

programme.title: Zoo TV
programme.desc: The serious showcases Singapore Zoo and it's animals, with each episode focusing on a specific genre ie: predators. The series looks at the different species of predators in the zoo, shares interesting information about specific animals and highlights endangered species.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 5
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 5
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: The weather has been so hot, that Dr Slime can hardly walk another step! With the use of fans and ice-cream, check out how Dr Slime can cool down in the fastest way possible!

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Dr Slime has recently gotten interested in making movies! From testing your filmmaking knowledge to building your own cinema, learn all about how to make a "3D movie" at home!

programme.title: Wild Kratts S7
programme.desc: In each episode, Chris and Martin Kratt travel to a different corner of the world to meet amazing new animals. Join the Wild Kratts for a laugh-out-loud comedy adventure, as Martin and Chris activate their Creature Power Suits to rescue their animal friends!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S13
programme.desc: A yellow sea sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants, who enjoys being a cook at Krusty Krab, lives in the Pacific Ocean. He embarks on various adventures with his friends at Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Eco Rangers
programme.desc: Mr Big Bucks is stepping up his involvement in the illegal wildlife trade! His men on the ground are trapping endangered animals to sell their parts for use in traditional medicine! The Scholar gathers the Eco Rangers to the rescue! But can they stop Mr Big Bucks' illegal wildlife trade operations?

programme.title: Jade Armor S2
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug & Cat Noir S4
programme.desc: The continuing adventures of Marinette and Adrien, two normal teens, transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir when evil threatens their city!

programme.title: Ultraman Omega
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Malay) There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: The Swan Princess: Far Longer Than Forever
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion to The Swan Princess saga, Derek discovers that his father was accused of having deals with pirates forcing him and Odette to go undercover.

programme.title: Wild Wild Wow S3
programme.desc: Did you know that a flamingo starts its life in a completely different color? On this episode of Wild Wild Wow Allie and Alfie learn the differences between baby and adult animals. Join in as they make a clucky song machine like a baby chic and craft a fluffy flamingo mama and baby.

In this series, they stay at a design hotel tucked away in a remote part of Iceland, experience the magic of the desert at a secluded Abu Dhabi resort, and venture beyond the lobby at London's most expensive - and exclusive - hotel, and more.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: This stunning blue-chip tentpole series is an exhilarating immersion into the sky world - celebrating and unravelling the unique challenges and ultimate freedom of defying gravity. From great soaring condors to leaping lemurs, and from gliding squirrels to beautifully buzzing orchid bees - prepare to embark on a worldwide adventure in the air. T.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Double Yummy

Singapore's smoky, wok-kissed Hokkien Mee tossed up by an ex-Michelin chef squares off against Taiwan's specialty Michelin's Bib Gourmand Eel Noodles, which is sweet, savoury and luxuriously silky. Andrew and Yasminne follow the strands that reveal each city's noodle DNAone built on wok hei, the other on slow-braised richness.

programme.title: 众神之地
programme.desc: 象群有十几头大象首领苏托多傣语完美之象当地人也叫它武则天老大阿提基多傣语国王除此之外还有老二老三老四等等其中老大老二老三三头成年公象是同一辈分新出生的小象都是老大的后代2007年这群大象从西双版纳国家级自然保护区管护局勐养子保护区出走渡过澜沧江辗转迁徙新的水电大坝和高速公路切断了回家的路它们和其他家族彻底失去了联系被困多年无法见到别的象群即将成年的公象无法找到配偶如何繁衍成了它们最大的问题当发情期到来决斗一触即发刚刚成年的老四向前来挑衅的老二发起挑战可惜它还是太过于年轻没有足够的力量战胜前辈老四不断后退发出叫声向自己的父亲也是象群现在的老大求救谁也没想到老大看着这一幕转身离开了这几乎是一个违背动物世界规则的决定.

programme.title: 众神之地
programme.desc: 象群有十几头大象首领苏托多傣语完美之象当地人也叫它武则天老大阿提基多傣语国王除此之外还有老二老三老四等等其中老大老二老三三头成年公象是同一辈分新出生的小象都是老大的后代2007年这群大象从西双版纳国家级自然保护区管护局勐养子保护区出走渡过澜沧江辗转迁徙新的水电大坝和高速公路切断了回家的路它们和其他家族彻底失去了联系被困多年无法见到别的象群即将成年的公象无法找到配偶如何繁衍成了它们最大的问题当发情期到来决斗一触即发刚刚成年的老四向前来挑衅的老二发起挑战可惜它还是太过于年轻没有足够的力量战胜前辈老四不断后退发出叫声向自己的父亲也是象群现在的老大求救谁也没想到老大看着这一幕转身离开了这几乎是一个违背动物世界规则的决定.
